nasb.text: Moreover, Shaphan the scribe told the king saying, “Hilkiah the priest has given me a book.” And Shaphan read it in the presence of the king.

esv.text: Then Shaphan the secretary told the king, “Hilkiah the priest has given me a book.” And Shaphan read it before the king.

cnv.text: 書記沙番又告訴王說：“希勒家大祭司交給我一卷書卷。”書記沙番就在王面前誦讀那書卷。

ccb.text: 他又告诉王：“希勒迦祭司给了我一卷书。”沙番就在王面前诵读这书。
